docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,750.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, LYNETTE T. AS TO DEFENDANT TINSLEY, ED INDIVIDUALLY & DBA JET MAIL FEDERAL EXPRESS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
